statement: The 33-vector, 14-basis Cabello set is a Kochen–Specker set (admits no {0,1} coloring) — refuting the ≥16-basis conjecture (Cabello, PRL 135, 190203, 2025)
falsifiable_claim: a {0,1}-assignment f of the 33 rays with f(u)+f(v) ≤ 1 for orthogonal u,v and exactly one 1 per orthonormal basis (a valid KS coloring)
theorem_src: theorem cabello_uncolorable : solve rays bases [] [] 30 = false

references.citation: Cabello, A. (2025). Simplest Kochen–Specker set. Physical Review Letters, 135, 190203 (arXiv:2508.07335).
Yu, S., & Oh, C. H. (2012). State-independent proof of Kochen–Specker theorem with 13 rays. Physical Review Letters, 108, 030402.
